project_type: Next.js 14 app with Prisma ORM, Supabase Postgres, deployed on Vercel
build_system: npm with Next.js build pipeline. CI: GitHub Actions runs npm ci, prisma generate, lint, build
test_framework: Vitest with jsdom environment, React Testing Library. Tests in tests/unit/ and tests/api/. Config at vitest.config.js
build_command: npm run build (requires DATABASE_URL and DIRECT_URL env vars set to any valid-looking postgres URL)
verification_instructions: 1. Set dummy env vars (DATABASE_URL/DIRECT_URL). 2. npx prisma generate. 3. npm run lint. 4. npm run build. 5. npx vitest run.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/migrations/ directory contains migration SQL files. Generated via prisma migrate dev. For this task, use prisma db push only (no new migration files).
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22. No real database available in sandbox (use dummy DATABASE_URL for build/lint). Prisma policy: use db push for active iteration, not migrate dev/deploy.
contribution_requirements: No destructive Prisma commands. Prioritize stability over rewrites. Keep existing working routes. Do not switch auth or DB providers. Admin auth uses Discord role IDs from env vars (DISCORD_ADMIN_ROLE_ID).
key_patterns: App Router with server components fetching via prisma, client components for interactivity. Admin session via HMAC-signed cookie (lib/adminSession.js). Discord OAuth roles via lib/discordAuth.js (hasDiscordAdminRole). Shared UI components in components/ui/. RetroWindow/BrutalButton/StatusBadge pattern. All DB access via lib/db.js singleton Prisma client. Error boundaries on routes. JSON serialization pattern: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(data)) for server-to-client prop passing.
directory_structure: app/ = Next.js app router (admin/, api/, captain/, draft/, matches/, players/, schedule/, standings/, teams/). lib/ = shared utilities and DB client. components/ = shared UI components. prisma/ = schema and migrations. tests/ = unit and API tests. docs/ = project documentation. scripts/ = operational verification scripts.
